      public KeyBindingsManager.Action getActionForKey(javafx.scene.input.KeyCode keyCode, KeyBindingsManager.PlayerMode mode)

    • getConflictingPlayerMode

      public KeyBindingsManager.PlayerMode getConflictingPlayerMode(javafx.scene.input.KeyCode keyCode, KeyBindingsManager.PlayerMode currentMode)
      Checks if a key is already bound to another player mode. Only checks between PLAYER1 and PLAYER2 (not SINGLE player).
      Parameters:
      keyCode - The key code to check
      currentMode - The current player mode trying to bind the key
      Returns:
      The player mode that already has this key bound, or null if no conflict

    • getActionInPlayerMode

      public KeyBindingsManager.Action getActionInPlayerMode(javafx.scene.input.KeyCode keyCode, KeyBindingsManager.PlayerMode conflictingMode)
      Gets the action that a key is bound to in another player mode.
      Parameters:
      keyCode - The key code to check
      conflictingMode - The player mode that has the key bound
      Returns:
      The action the key is bound to in the conflicting mode

    • getKeyBindingDisplay

      public String getKeyBindingDisplay(KeyBindingsManager.PlayerMode mode, KeyBindingsManager.Action action)
